zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustachie de Blois於1134年6月21日出生在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre39歲，母親Mathilde de Boulogne28歲。她和Anselme I de SAINT-POL至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1164年11月24日在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Blois
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Blois in Loire-et-Cher and, in some cases possibly also from a place of the same name in Jura. Compare   Deblois  .
French: nickname from the Old French adjective blois ‘lisping’.

variants.name: Bloise
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rolando, Salvatore, Biagio, Carmelo, Giulio.  Spanish Alejandro, Ines, Jose, Juan Antonio, Luis.
Italian (Calabria): from French Blois . The surname Bloise is also found in southern France (Bouches-du-Rhône) and in the Dominican Republic.
English (Suffolk): variant of   Blois  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Deblois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Rosaire, Amelie, Damien, Emile, Fernand, Herve, Jacques, Jean Guy, Monique, Ovide.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, for someone from Blois (see Blois ).

nameMeanings.name: Eustachie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustachie de Blois was born on 21 June 1134, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, her father, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, was 39 and her mother, Mathilde de Boulogne, was 28. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Anselme I de SAINT-POL. She died on 24 November 1164, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustachie de Blois est née le 21 juin 1134, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, son père, Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Boulogne, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Anselme I de SAINT-POL. Elle est décédée le 24 novembre 1164, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustachie de Blois am 21. Juni 1134 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre 39 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Boulogne 28. Sie hatte mit Anselme I de SAINT-POL mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 24. November 1164 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustachie de Bloisが1134年6月21日にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterreは39歳，母Mathilde de Boulogneは28歳であった。彼女はAnselme I de SAINT-POLとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1164年11月24日にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustachie de Blois(이)가 1134년 6월 21일 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Boulogne(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Anselme I de SAINT-POL(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1164년 11월 24일 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustachie de Blois родилась 21 июня 1134 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция, её отцу по имени Étienne de Blois roi d'Angleterre было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Boulogne, 28. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Anselme I de SAINT-POL. Она умерла 24 ноября 1164 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.
